sentences.target: Cette étoffe me plaît pour les rideaux.
sentences.reading: /sɛt e.tɔf mə plɛ puʁ le ʁi.do/

translations.fr: Cette étoffe me plaît pour les rideaux.
translations.ipa: /sɛt e.tɔf mə plɛ puʁ le ʁi.do/
translations.en: I like this fabric for the curtains.
translations.es: Me gusta esta tela para las cortinas.
translations.de: Dieser Stoff gefällt mir für die Vorhänge.
translations.it: Questa stoffa mi piace per le tende.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢这块布料做窗帘。
translations.yue: 我鍾意呢塊布用嚟做窗簾。
translations.ru: Мне нравится эта ткань для штор.
translations.pt: Eu gosto deste tecido para as cortinas.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הבד הזה לווילונות.
translations.vi: Tôi thích tấm vải này cho rèm cửa.
translations.nl: Deze stof bevalt me voor de gordijnen.
translations.uk: Мені подобається ця тканина для штор.
translations.hu: Tetszik ez az anyag a függönyökhöz.
translations.hi: मुझे परदों के लिए यह कपड़ा पसंद है।
translations.pl: Podoba mi się ten materiał na zasłony.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει αυτό το ύφασμα για τις κουρτίνες.
translations.nb: Jeg liker dette stoffet til gardinene.
translations.id: Saya suka kain ini untuk tirai.
translations.sv: Jag gillar det här tyget till gardinerna.
translations.ro: Îmi place această stofă pentru perdele.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi tato látka na závěsy.
translations.da: Jeg kan lide dette stof til gardinerne.
translations.ja: カーテンにはこの生地が気に入っています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifies the head noun 'étoffe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; syntactic subject of 'plaît'.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; indirect object (recipient) of the verb 'plaire'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'étoffe' and selects an indirect object ('me').
Preposition introducing a purpose/destination phrase ('pour les rideaux').
Definite article, plural; determines 'rideaux'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu préfères cette étoffe pour la nappe.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁe.fɛʁ sɛt e.tɔf puʁ la nap/

translations.fr: Tu préfères cette étoffe pour la nappe.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁe.fɛʁ sɛt e.tɔf puʁ la nap/
translations.en: You prefer this fabric for the tablecloth.
translations.es: Prefieres esta tela para el mantel.
translations.de: Du bevorzugst diesen Stoff für die Tischdecke.
translations.it: Tu preferisci questa stoffa per la tovaglia.
translations.ko: 너는 식탁보용으로 이 원단을 더 좋아해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢这块布料做桌布。
translations.yue: 你比較鍾意呢塊布用嚟做枱布。
translations.ru: Ты предпочитаешь эту ткань для скатерти.
translations.pt: Você prefere este tecido para a toalha de mesa.
translations.he: אתה מעדיף את הבד הזה למפה.
translations.tr: Sen masa örtüsü için bu kumaşı tercih ediyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn thích tấm vải này cho khăn bàn hơn.
translations.ar: أنت تفضل هذا القماش لمفرش المائدة.
translations.nl: Je hebt deze stof liever voor het tafelkleed.
translations.uk: Ти віддаєш перевагу цій тканині для скатертини.
translations.hu: Te inkább ezt az anyagot választod a terítőhöz.
translations.hi: तुम मेज़पोश के लिए यह कपड़ा ज़्यादा पसंद करते हो।
translations.el: Προτιμάς αυτό το ύφασμα για το τραπεζομάντιλο.
translations.nb: Du foretrekker dette stoffet til duken.
translations.id: Kamu lebih suka kain ini untuk taplak meja.
translations.sv: Du föredrar det här tyget till bordduken.
translations.ro: Tu preferi această stofă pentru fața de masă.
translations.da: Du foretrækker dette stof til dugen.
translations.ja: あなたはテーブルクロスにはこの生地のほうが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes 'cette étoffe' as direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'étoffe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'préfères'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/destination phrase ('pour la nappe').
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'nappe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Nous coupons l'étoffe pour le costume.

translations.fr: Nous coupons l'étoffe pour le costume.
translations.en: We are cutting the fabric for the suit.
translations.es: Estamos cortando la tela para el traje.
translations.de: Wir schneiden den Stoff für den Anzug zu.
translations.it: Stiamo tagliando la stoffa per l'abito.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在裁这块布料做西装。
translations.pt: Estamos cortando o tecido para o traje.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cắt vải để may bộ vest.
translations.nl: We knippen de stof voor het pak.
translations.hi: हम सूट के लिए कपड़ा काट रहे हैं।
translations.el: Κόβουμε το ύφασμα για το κοστούμι.
translations.id: Kami sedang memotong kain untuk setelan jas.
translations.ja: 私たちはスーツ用に生地を裁断しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object 'étoffe'.
Definite article elided before a vowel-initial noun; here corresponds to feminine singular (underlying 'la') in 'l'étoffe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'coupons'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/destination phrase ('pour le costume').
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'costume'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; lexical 'avoir' (not auxiliary here).
Preposition forming a partitive construction with the following elided article ('de l'').
Definite article elided before a vowel-initial noun; forms the partitive article 'de l'' with 'de'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement in the partitive NP 'de l'étoffe'. Often idiomatic in 'avoir de l'étoffe' meaning someone has substance/talent.
